creator: matthias.andree@web.de
text:
I have "INSTALL=install -C" listed in my /etc/make.conf. When I do make 
install on postfix-current, I get two warnings by install that -C and -d 
were mutually exclusive:

install: the -d and -C options may not be specified together

Fix: 

none known, is there an INSTALL_DIR option or something?
How-To-Repeat: deinstall the postfix-current port, build and install it and watch the output.
